allow: Bash(npx shadcn@latest add button card input label select dialog tabs toast dropdown-menu --yes --cache /tmp/npm-cache-journology)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial project setup: Next.js 14 + Prisma + Supabase + shadcn/ui

- Next.js 14 App Router with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, ESLint
- Prisma schema with 11 tables for journey/event data model
- Supabase auth helpers \(server + client\) and Prisma singleton
- shadcn/ui components: button, card, input, label, select, dialog, tabs, toast, dropdown-menu
- Seed script with Bond Night example data \(6 guests, 4 clues, 6 venues, 6 message templates\)
- Project docs: requirements, schema reference, setup checklist
EOF
\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); servers=d.get\(''''mcpServers'''',{}\); [print\(k\) for k in servers]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if ''''mcp'''' in k.lower\(\) or ''''server'''' in k.lower\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")
